description: MetaTrader 5 Integration - Hybrid trading with Deriv.com liquidity, MT5 order execution, technical indicators, position management, and trade history storage

userStories.title: Create MT5 client with connection management
userStories.description: As a system, I need to establish and monitor MT5 terminal connection.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement connect() function that calls POST /mt5/connect
Implement disconnect() function that calls POST /mt5/disconnect
Implement isConnected() function that calls GET /mt5/status
Implement healthCheck() function with ping every 30s
Add connection state: connected, disconnected, error
userStories.notes: Implemented MT5Client class with full connection management, state tracking, health checks, and listener pattern

userStories.title: Create TypeScript types for MT5 data structures
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript interfaces for all MT5 data types.
acceptanceCriteria: Add MT5ConnectionInfo interface with connected, accountNumber, company, server, terminalPath, lastHeartbeat, latency
Add MT5AccountInfo interface with login, company, currency, balance, equity, margin, freeMargin, marginLevel, leverage
Add MT5ErrorCode enum and MT5Error interface
userStories.notes: Implemented comprehensive TypeScript types for MT5 integration including connection, account, orders, positions, trade history, indicators, errors, terminal status, symbol info, price sync, signal execution, and listener types

userStories.title: Create useMT5Connection hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to access MT5 connection state.
acceptanceCriteria: Return connection state from MT5 client
userStories.notes: Implemented React hook for accessing and managing MT5 connection state with auto-refresh every 5 seconds, proper cleanup, and comprehensive state management including connection info, account info, latency, loading, and error states

userStories.title: Create MT5AccountInfo component
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my MT5 account details.
acceptanceCriteria: Display balance, equity, used margin, free margin
Verify account info displays correctly in browser
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented MT5AccountInfo component with all acceptance criteria met. Created comprehensive component displaying account number, company, currency, balance, equity, used margin, free margin, margin level percentage with visual indicator, and leverage ratio. Added AccountInfoSkeleton loading state with CardSkeleton components from loading-skeleton.tsx. Added CompactErrorState error handling with retry functionality. Integrated auto-refresh every 5 seconds via useMT5Connection hook. Added MT5 section to sidebar navigation and page.tsx. Uses shadcn/ui Card, Badge, and Button components with professional styling. Typecheck passes and build succeeds.

userStories.title: Create MT5 order execution functions
userStories.description: As a system, I need to execute trades through MT5 terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Add trade comment with evolution generation
Add magic number for system identification (default: 123456)
Return MT5OrderResult with success, ticket, error, executionPrice
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented comprehensive MT5 order execution functions in src/lib/mt5/orders.ts. Created executeMT5Order() function with full retry logic (3 attempts with exponential backoff), comprehensive error handling with MT5ErrorCode mapping, and detailed logging of all order attempts. Added executeMarketOrder() convenience function for instant execution BUY/SELL orders. Added executePendingOrder() convenience function for BUY_LIMIT, SELL_LIMIT, BUY_STOP, SELL_STOP orders with price and expiration support. All orders automatically include evolution generation in trade comment format: 'Gen:{generation}' or '{comment} | Gen:{generation}'. Default magic number (123456) is used for system identification if not provided. Order validation includes checks for symbol, volume (0-100 lots), order type, price for pending orders, SL/TP values, and magic number range. Smart retry logic skips non-retryable errors (INVALID_PARAMETERS, INVALID_VOLUME, INVALID_PRICE, NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY, MARKET_CLOSED, TRADE_DISABLED, LOGIN_FAILED). All order attempts are logged with attempt number, request parameters, execution result, ticket, execution price, and duration. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create MT5 position management functions
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to manage open positions in MT5.
acceptanceCriteria: Add closeMT5Position() function calling POST /mt5/positions/close with ticket and optional lots
Add modifyMT5Position() function calling PUT /mt5/positions/modify with ticket, sl, tp
Return boolean from close and modify functions
userStories.notes: Implemented comprehensive MT5 position management functions in src/lib/mt5/positions.ts. Created getMT5Positions() function calling GET /mt5/positions/open that returns MT5Position[] array with graceful error handling (returns empty array on failure). Created closeMT5Position() function calling POST /mt5/positions/close with ticket and optional lots parameter for partial position close support. Created modifyMT5Position() function calling PUT /mt5/positions/modify with ticket, stopLoss, and takeProfit parameters (set to 0 to remove SL/TP). All functions return boolean success status. Added comprehensive validation for ticket numbers, lots values, and stop loss/take profit values. All position modification attempts are logged with ticket numbers, parameters, success/failure status, and duration. Error handling includes MT5ErrorCode mapping for position-related errors (POSITION_NOT_FOUND, INVALID_TICKET, INVALID_PRICE, INVALID_VOLUME, TRADE_DISABLED, MARKET_CLOSED, CONNECTION_LOST). Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create useMT5Positions hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to access and manage MT5 positions.
acceptanceCriteria: Return positions array, loading, error states
userStories.notes: Implemented React hook for accessing and managing MT5 positions with auto-refresh every 3 seconds, proper cleanup on unmount, and comprehensive state management. Created src/hooks/useMT5Positions.ts with MT5PositionsData interface (positions array, isLoading, error states) and UseMT5PositionsReturn interface extending with closePosition(ticket, lots) and modifyPosition(ticket, sl, tp) functions. The closePosition function supports full or partial position close via optional lots parameter and automatically refreshes positions after successful close. The modifyPosition function supports updating stop loss and/or take profit (set to 0 to remove SL/TP) and automatically refreshes positions after successful modification. Both functions include comprehensive error handling with proper error state management and console error logging. Auto-refresh runs every 3 seconds with proper interval cleanup on unmount. Uses useRef for mount tracking to prevent state updates after unmount. Initial fetch occurs immediately on mount. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create MT5 technical indicator functions
userStories.description: As a system, I need to use MT5 indicators for market analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Support timeframes: M1, M5, M15, M30, H1, H4, D1
userStories.notes: Implemented comprehensive MT5 technical indicator functions in src/lib/mt5/indicators.ts. Created getRSI() function calling POST /mt5/indicators/rsi with RSI value and timestamp. Created getMACD() function calling POST /mt5/indicators/macd returning macd, signal, and histogram values. Created getMovingAverage() function calling POST /mt5/indicators/ma with MA value and timestamp. Created getBollingerBands() function calling POST /mt5/indicators/bollinger returning upper, middle, and lower bands. Created getATR() function calling POST /mt5/indicators/atr with ATR value and timestamp. All functions support timeframes M1, M5, M15, M30, H1, H4, D1, W1, MN with validation. Implemented IndicatorCache class with 30-second TTL for all indicator values. Added getMultipleIndicators() function for parallel calculation of multiple indicators. Added clearIndicatorCache() and getIndicatorCacheStats() utility functions. All functions include comprehensive validation for symbol, timeframe, and period parameters. Error handling includes MT5ErrorCode mapping and detailed console logging for all operations. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create useMT5Indicators hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to access MT5 indicator values.
acceptanceCriteria: Return RSI value with loading state
Return MACD values (macd, signal, histogram) with loading state
Return MA value with loading state
Return Bollinger Bands (upper, middle, lower) with loading state
Return ATR value with loading state
userStories.notes: Implemented React hook for accessing MT5 technical indicators with auto-refresh every 10 seconds. Created src/hooks/useMT5Indicators.ts with IndicatorData<T> interface (value, isLoading, error states) and UseMT5IndicatorsReturn interface returning rsi, macd, ma, bollingerBands, and atr indicator data. Hook accepts symbol, timeframe (defaults to H1), and period (defaults to 14) parameters. All indicators return their values with individual loading and error states for independent fetching and error handling. MACD returns structured object with macd, signal, and histogram values. Bollinger Bands returns structured object with upper, middle, and lower band values. refreshIndicators() function allows manual refresh of all indicators. Uses useRef for mount tracking to prevent state updates after unmount. Initial fetch occurs immediately on mount. Each indicator fetch includes comprehensive error handling with console error logging. Auto-refresh runs every 10 seconds with proper interval cleanup on unmount. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create MT5 trade history functions
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to access my complete MT5 trade history.
acceptanceCriteria: Support startDate, endDate, symbol filter parameters
Return MT5TradeHistory[] with ticket, symbol, direction, lots, prices, times, profit, commission, swap, comment
userStories.notes: Implemented comprehensive MT5 trade history functions in src/lib/mt5/history.ts. Created getMT5TradeHistory() function calling GET /mt5/history/trades with optional filters for startDate, endDate, and symbol parameters. Returns MT5TradeHistory[] array with all completed trade details including ticket, symbol, direction, lots, openPrice, closePrice, openTime, closeTime, profit, commission, swap, comment, and magic number. Added comprehensive validation for date parameters (ISO format, start date before end date) and symbol filtering. All date strings are automatically converted to Date objects. Created convertToCSV() utility function that properly escapes CSV values containing commas, quotes, or newlines. CSV includes headers: Ticket, Symbol, Direction, Lots, Open Price, Close Price, Open Time, Close Time, Profit, Commission, Swap, Comment, Magic Number. Created downloadFile() utility function using Blob API to trigger browser downloads with proper MIME type support and cleanup (revokeObjectURL). Created exportMT5HistoryToCSV() function that fetches trade history, converts to CSV, generates filename with timestamp and optional symbol suffix (e.g., mt5-trades-V10-2024-01-15.csv), and triggers download. All functions include comprehensive error handling with MT5ErrorCode mapping and detailed console logging for all operations (fetch attempts, results, duration). Returns empty array on fetch errors instead of throwing for graceful degradation. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create Deriv to MT5 price sync function
userStories.description: As a system, I need to sync Deriv price data with MT5 for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept DerivPriceData[] with symbol, price, timestamp
Map Deriv symbols (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100) to MT5 symbols
Send bid and ask prices to MT5
Log price sync attempts with results
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented Deriv to MT5 price sync functions in src/lib/mt5/sync.ts. Created syncDerivToMT5() function calling POST /mt5/sync/prices endpoint with comprehensive symbol mapping between Deriv volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100) and MT5 symbol names (Volatility 10 Index, Volatility 25 Index, etc.). Added bid/ask price support - uses provided bid/ask values or calculates from single price. Implemented DERIV_TO_MT5_SYMBOL_MAP and MT5_TO_DERIV_SYMBOL_MAP for bidirectional symbol conversion with support for alternative MT5 naming variations (VOL10, Volatility10, etc.). Added utility functions: mapDerivToMT5Symbol(), mapMT5ToDerivSymbol(), isDerivVolatilityIndex(), getSupportedVolatilityIndices(), getSymbolMapping(), and syncSingleDerivPrice() convenience function. All price sync attempts are logged with attempt details, synced count, failed count, errors, and duration. Price sync failures are handled gracefully with proper error logging instead of throwing exceptions. Returns PriceSyncResult with success boolean, synced count, failed count, and errors array. Error handling includes MT5ErrorCode mapping for connection-related errors (CONNECTION_LOST, TERMINAL_NOT_FOUND) and proper HTTP status code handling. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create useDerivPriceSync hook
userStories.description: As a system, I need to automatically sync Deriv prices to MT5.
acceptanceCriteria: Show sync status indicator (syncing, error, success)
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented useDerivPriceSync hook in src/hooks/useDerivPriceSync.ts. Created comprehensive hook that automatically syncs Deriv.com price data to MetaTrader 5 terminal. Hook fetches market overview prices via fetchMarketsOverview() and converts MarketsOverviewResponse to DerivPriceData[] format, filtering for volatility indices (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100). Calls syncDerivToMT5() every 1 second with automatic sync management. Shows sync status indicator with four states: idle, syncing, success, and error. Tracks consecutive errors for retry logic and stores last sync time and result. Handles sync errors gracefully with console error logging and consecutive error tracking. Automatically stops sync when MT5 connection state changes to disconnected or error via MT5 client state change listener. Provides startSync(), stopSync(), and manualSync() control functions. Proper cleanup of intervals and timeouts on unmount with isMounted ref tracking to prevent state updates after unmount. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create MT5 error handler
userStories.description: As a system, I need to handle MT5 errors with user-friendly messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Define MT5ErrorCode enum: TERMINAL_NOT_FOUND, LOGIN_FAILED, CONNECTION_LOST, ORDER_REJECTED, NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY, MARKET_CLOSED, INVALID_PRICE
Define MT5Error interface with code, message, details
Show toast for CONNECTION_LOST with reconnection status
Show toast for ORDER_REJECTED with error reason
Show default toast for other errors
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented MT5 error handler in src/lib/mt5/errors.ts. Created comprehensive error handling module with handleMT5Error() function that displays user-friendly toast notifications using sonner toast system. Implemented ERROR_MESSAGES mapping with titles and descriptions for all MT5 error codes (TERMINAL_NOT_FOUND, LOGIN_FAILED, CONNECTION_LOST, ORDER_REJECTED, NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY, MARKET_CLOSED, INVALID_PRICE, INVALID_VOLUME, INVALID_PARAMETERS, SERVER_BUSY, TRADE_DISABLED, POSITION_NOT_FOUND, INVALID_TICKET, UNKNOWN_ERROR). Created createMT5Error() helper function for constructing error objects. Added handleMT5ApiError() function for parsing HTTP error responses and converting to MT5Error objects with proper status code mapping (404=TERMINAL_NOT_FOUND, 401=LOGIN_FAILED, 503=CONNECTION_LOST). Added getErrorMessage() utility for retrieving user-friendly error messages. Implemented isRetryableError() function to identify retryable errors (CONNECTION_LOST, SERVER_BUSY, INVALID_PRICE). Implemented shouldDisableTrading() function to identify errors that should disable trading (CONNECTION_LOST, TERMINAL_NOT_FOUND, LOGIN_FAILED, TRADE_DISABLED, MARKET_CLOSED). All acceptance criteria met: toast notifications display correctly for CONNECTION_LOST with reconnection status, ORDER_REJECTED with error reason, NOT_ENOUGH_MONEY, MARKET_CLOSED, and default errors. Uses existing sonner toast system. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Implement MT5 auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
userStories.description: As a user, I need the system to automatically reconnect to MT5.
acceptanceCriteria: Show 'Reconnecting to MT5...' toast during attempts
Show error toast after 5 failed attempts
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented MT5 auto-reconnect with exponential backoff in src/lib/mt5/errors.ts. Created attemptMT5Reconnect() function with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s) for up to 5 attempts. Shows 'Reconnecting to MT5...' toast during attempts with progress indicator. Shows success toast when reconnected with attempt count. Shows error toast after all 5 attempts fail with error details. Disables trading when MT5 disconnected via disableMT5Trading() and enables on successful reconnection. Tracks reconnection success rate via ReconnectionStats interface with totalAttempts, successfulReconnections, failedReconnections, lastReconnectionTime, and averageReconnectionTime. Added getReconnectionStats() to retrieve statistics and resetReconnectionStats() to reset after manual connections. Logs all reconnection attempts with attempt number, delay, success/failure status, and duration. Added helper functions: calculateBackoffDelay() for exponential backoff calculation and sleep() for delay handling. Added isMT5TradingDisabled() to check trading state. Exported ReconnectionResult and ReconnectionStats interfaces. Uses existing sonner toast system. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create MT5TerminalStatus component
userStories.description: As an admin, I need detailed MT5 terminal status information.
acceptanceCriteria: Display MT5 terminal path, build version
Display connection status with colored badge
Display ping latency, last heartbeat time
Display data buffers status for each symbol (V10-V100)
Show MT5 error log with timestamps
Verify status displays correctly in browser
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented MT5TerminalStatus component in src/components/dashboard/MT5TerminalStatus.tsx. Created comprehensive component displaying detailed MT5 terminal status information. Component displays terminal path, build version, connection state with colored badge (green for connected, red for disconnected/error, yellow for error state), ping latency in ms, and last heartbeat time formatted with month/day/time. Shows data buffers status for each symbol (V10-V100) with color-coded indicators (green < 50%, yellow 50-80%, red > 80%) and percentage usage. Displays trade allowed flag with Shield/ShieldAlert icon and colored status (green for allowed, red for not allowed). Displays trade context info with Zap icon showing Available or Busy status. Added 'Test Connection' button that calls testConnection() from hook with loading state. Added 'Restart Connection' button that calls restartConnection() from hook with loading state. Added refresh button for manual status refresh. Shows MT5 error log with timestamps in collapsible section with error code badge, formatted date/time, error message, and error details. Auto-refreshes every 5 seconds via useMT5TerminalStatus hook. Uses shadcn/ui Card, Badge, Button, Collapsible components and CardSkeleton, CompactErrorState for loading/error states. Uses lucide-react icons for visual elements. Component integrated into MT5 section of main page.tsx alongside MT5AccountInfo in a 2-column grid layout. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create useMT5TerminalStatus hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to access MT5 terminal status.
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented useMT5TerminalStatus hook in src/hooks/useMT5TerminalStatus.ts. Created comprehensive hook that provides access to MT5 terminal status information. Hook calls GET /mt5/terminal-info endpoint to fetch terminal status data including connection state, terminal path, build version, ping, last heartbeat, trade permissions, trade context busy status, data buffers for each symbol, and error logs. Returns MT5TerminalStatus object with all status data, loading state, and error state. Includes testConnection() function that calls POST /mt5/test-connection to test connection and refreshes status on success. Includes restartConnection() function that calls POST /mt5/restart-connection to restart connection and refreshes status on success. Includes refreshStatus() function for manual refresh of terminal status. Auto-refreshes every 5 seconds with proper interval cleanup on unmount. Uses useRef for mount tracking to prevent state updates after unmount. Initial fetch occurs immediately on mount. Date string conversion to Date objects for lastHeartbeat and error log timestamps. All fetch attempts include comprehensive error handling with proper error state management and console error logging. Typecheck passes with no errors.

userStories.title: Create signal execution through MT5 function
userStories.description: As a system, I need to execute trades based on signals through MT5.
acceptanceCriteria: Accept TradingSignal with signalId, symbol, direction, confidence, features, riskPercent
Calculate position size based on risk percentage
Calculate SL/TP based on ATR (2x ATR for SL)
Add comment with signal ID, generation, features
Return ExecutedTrade with systemTicket, mt5Ticket, execution details

userStories.title: Create MT5 connection status indicator in header
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see MT5 connection status at all times.
acceptanceCriteria: Add MT5 connection indicator to header component
Show green dot when MT5 connected
Show tooltip with connection details (latency, server)
Verify indicator displays correctly in browser

userStories.title: Integrate MT5 positions with active trades table
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see MT5 position IDs alongside system tickets.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EnhancedActiveTradesTable to show MT5 ticket column
Display MT5 ticket number alongside system ticket
Link MT5 ticket to position in MT5 terminal
Show position comment (evolution generation) in tooltip
Sync position updates from MT5 via WebSocket
Update position P&L in real-time from MT5
Verify positions sync correctly in browser
